message.content:
Explore the directory /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens thoroughly. I need to understand:

1. The folder structure and screen organization
2. How screens receive data (props, redux, API responses)
3. Look for any JSON/config structures that come from backend
4. Identify patterns of "dynamic" content that is actually hardcoded slots
5. Find examples where adding a simple feature (bold text, link, image) would require code changes

Focus on screens related to:
- Voucher/rescue flows
- Points program
- Any screen that claims to be "dynamic"

Return a detailed analysis with code examples showing the current limitations.

content.text: I'll thoroughly explore this React Native fintech app to understand its screen architecture, data flow, and dynamic content handling. Let me start with a comprehensive investigation.

1→export const KEY_NAME_TO_ICON = {
     2→  RESCUE_IN_INVOICE: 'cashback na fatura',
     3→  MARKETPLACE: 'shopping',
     4→  FUEL_VOUCHER: 'voucher para abastecimento',
     5→  MONTHLY_DISCOUNT: 'desconto na mensalidade',
     6→  CAR_INSURANCE_DISCOUNT: 'voucher para seguro auto',
     7→  PARKING_DISCOUNT: 'voucher para estacionamento',
     8→  FINES_DISCOUNT: 'desconto em multas e debitos',
     9→  IPVA_DISCOUNT: 'voucher para ipva e outros debitos',
    10→  AIRLINE_MILES: 'milhas aereas',
    11→};
    12→
    13→export const NAME_TO_ICON: Record<string, string> = {
    14→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.RESCUE_IN_INVOICE]: 'icon-discount',
    15→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.MARKETPLACE]: 'icon-shopping-bag',
    16→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.FUEL_VOUCHER]: 'icon-supply',
    17→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.MONTHLY_DISCOUNT]: 'icon-debit-account',
    18→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.CAR_INSURANCE_DISCOUNT]: 'icon-protect-car',
    19→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.PARKING_DISCOUNT]: 'icon-toll-gate',
    20→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.FINES_DISCOUNT]: 'icon-attach',
    21→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.IPVA_DISCOUNT]: 'icon-vehicle',
    22→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.AIRLINE_MILES]: 'icon-airplane',
    23→};
    24→
    25→const NAME_TO_KEY: Record<string, string> = {
    26→  'resgate de cashback em fatura': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.RESCUE_IN_INVOICE,
    27→  marketplace: KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.MARKETPLACE,
    28→  'voucher para abastecimento': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.FUEL_VOUCHER,
    29→  'desconto na mensalidade': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.MONTHLY_DISCOUNT,
    30→  'desconto seguro auto': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.CAR_INSURANCE_DISCOUNT,
    31→  'desconto em estacionamento': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.PARKING_DISCOUNT,
    32→  'desconto em multas e debitos': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.FINES_DISCOUNT,
    33→  'desconto ipva': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.IPVA_DISCOUNT,
    34→  'milhas aereas': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.AIRLINE_MILES,
    35→};
    36→
    37→export const getNormalizedKeyName = (name: string): string => {
    38→  switch (NAME_TO_KEY[name]) {
    39→    case 'resgate de cashback em fatura':
    40→      return 'cashback na fatura';
    41→    case 'shopping':
    42→      return 'marketplace';
    43→    case 'voucher para abastecimento':
    44→      return 'voucher para abastecimento';
    45→    case 'desconto na mensalidade':
    46→      return 'desconto na mensalidade';
    47→    case 'voucher para seguro auto':
    48→      return 'desconto seguro auto';
    49→    case 'voucher para estacionamento':
    50→      return 'desconto em estacionamento';
    51→    case 'desconto em multas e débitos':
    52→      return 'desconto em multas e debitos';
    53→    case 'voucher para ipva e outros debitos':
    54→      return 'desconto ipva';
    55→    case 'milhas aereas':
    56→      return 'milhas aereas';
    57→    default:
    58→      return '';
    59→  }
    60→};
    61→
    62→export const rescueDescription: Record<string, string> = {
    63→  '203': 'Cashback na fatura',
    64→  '204': 'Desconto na Mensalidade',
    65→  '205': 'Voucher para estacionamento',
    66→  '206': 'Voucher para abastecimento',
    67→  '207': 'Voucher para Seguro Auto',
    68→  '208': 'Voucher para IPVA e outros débitos',
    69→  '209': 'Milhas Aéreas',
    70→};
    71→

1→import {
     2→  BackDropBottom,
     3→  Box,
     4→  Button,
     5→  CardActivity,
     6→  DetailTransactionValue,
     7→  SeparatorHorizontal,
     8→  TagLabel,
     9→  Text,
    10→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    11→import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
    12→import React, { FC } from 'react';
    13→import { Linking } from 'react-native';
    14→import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
    15→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
    16→import { moment } from '../../services/moment';
    17→import { formatToCurrency } from '../../utils/functions';
    18→import { PointsDetailProps } from './Models';
    19→import {
    20→  getDetailScreenTitle,
    21→  getFormattedHighlightText,
    22→  getFormattedPointsValue,
    23→  getOrigin,
    24→  getPurchaseTypeLabel,
    25→  getTagSubType,
    26→  getTransactionGainType,
    27→  getVehicleInfo,
    28→} from './utils';
    29→
    30→const PointsDetailView: FC<PointsDetailProps> = ({
    31→  handleGoBack,
    32→  transaction,
    33→  modalizeRef,
    34→  handleOpenReportProblem,
    35→  handleCloseReportProblem,
    36→}) => {
    37→  const gainType = getTransactionGainType(transaction);
    38→  const tagSubType = getTagSubType(transaction);
    39→  const screenTitle = getDetailScreenTitle(gainType, transaction.type);
    40→  const vehicleInfo = getVehicleInfo(transaction);
    41→  const purchaseTypeLabel = getPurchaseTypeLabel(tagSubType);
    42→  const origin = getOrigin(transaction);
    43→  const formattedCurrencyValue = formatToCurrency(transaction.currencyValue);
    44→  const formattedPointsValue = getFormattedPointsValue(
    45→    transaction.amount,
    46→    transaction.type,
    47→  );
    48→  const cardTitle = transaction.description || '';
    49→  const highlightText = getFormattedHighlightText(
    50→    transaction.date,
    51→    gainType,
    52→    moment,
    53→  );
    54→
    55→  const renderDivider = () => {
    56→    return (
    57→      <SeparatorHorizontal
    58→        borderWidth="smaller"
    59→        borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
    60→        height={1}
    61→        width="100%"
    62→        mt="xxxxs"
    63→      />
    64→    );
    65→  };
    66→
    67→  const renderTagContent = () => {
    68→    const hasVehicleInfo = !!vehicleInfo && vehicleInfo !== '';
    69→    const shouldShowOrigin = origin && !hasVehicleInfo;
    70→    const hasPurchaseTypeLabel =
    71→      !!purchaseTypeLabel && purchaseTypeLabel !== '';
    72→
    73→    return (
    74→      <>
    75→        {renderDivider()}
    76→        {shouldShowOrigin && (
    77→          <>
    78→            <Text
    79→              type="paragraphXL"
    80→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    81→              mb="xxxxs"
    82→              mt="xxxxs"
    83→            >
    84→              Origem
    85→            </Text>
    86→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
    87→              {origin}
    88→            </Text>
    89→            {renderDivider()}
    90→          </>
    91→        )}
    92→        {hasVehicleInfo && (
    93→          <>
    94→            <Text
    95→              type="paragraphXL"
    96→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    97→              mb="xxxxs"
    98→              mt="xxxxs"
    99→            >
   100→              Tag
   101→            </Text>
   102→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   103→              {vehicleInfo}
   104→            </Text>
   105→            {renderDivider()}
   106→          </>
   107→        )}
   108→
   109→        {hasPurchaseTypeLabel && (
   110→          <>
   111→            <Text
   112→              type="paragraphXL"
   113→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   114→              mb="xxxxs"
   115→              mt="xxxxs"
   116→            >
   117→              Tipo de compra
   118→            </Text>
   119→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   120→              {purchaseTypeLabel}
   121→            </Text>
   122→          </>
   123→        )}
   124→      </>
   125→    );
   126→  };
   127→
   128→  return (
   129→    <>
   130→      <BasicScreen
   131→        title={screenTitle}
   132→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
   133→        hasScroll
   134→        errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
   135→      >
   136→        <DetailTransactionValue
   137→          icon={transaction.icon as never}
   138→          title={cardTitle}
   139→          titleColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   140→          iconBgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   141→          points={formattedPointsValue}
   142→          bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   143→          pointsColor={
   144→            transaction.type === 'CREDIT' || transaction.type === 'REFUNDED'
   145→              ? 'PLUS_COLOR_02'
   146→              : ('INTENSE_COLOR_05' as const)
   147→          }
   148→        />
   149→
   150→        <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" mt="xxxxs" flex={1}>
   151→          <TagLabel
   152→            icon={undefined}
   153→            type="neutral"
   154→            text={highlightText}
   155→            showSpacing
   156→          />
   157→
   158→          <Box mt="xxxs" flex={1} width="100%">
   159→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs">
   160→              Valor
   161→            </Text>
   162→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   163→              {formattedCurrencyValue}
   164→            </Text>
   165→
   166→            {gainType === 'TAG' && renderTagContent()}
   167→          </Box>
   168→
   169→          <Box width="100%" align="flex-end" mb="small">
   170→            <Button
   171→              type="secundaryLarge"
   172→              text="Relatar Problema"
   173→              onPress={handleOpenReportProblem}
   174→            />
   175→          </Box>
   176→        </Box>
   177→      </BasicScreen>
   178→
   179→      <BackDropBottom modalizeRef={modalizeRef as PropsModalizeRef}>
   180→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxs">
   181→          <Box align="center" width="100%">
   182→            <Text
   183→              type="paragraphXXXL"
   184→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   185→              mb="xs"
   186→              align="center"
   187→            >
   188→              Central de Atendimento
   189→            </Text>
   190→          </Box>
   191→        </Box>
   192→
   193→        <Box pd="innerSmall">
   194→          <CardActivity
   195→            mt="nano"
   196→            icon="icon-contact"
   197→            title="Capitais"
   198→            description="4002 1552"
   199→            iconRight="icon-next"
   200→            showIcon
   201→            showTagLabel={false}
   202→            onPress={() => {
   203→              eventSelectContent({
   204→                content_type: 'cta',
   205→                content_id: 'telefones_capitais',
   206→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   207→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   208→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   209→              });
   210→              Linking.openURL('tel:40021552');
   211→            }}
   212→          />
   213→
   214→          <CardActivity
   215→            mt="nano"
   216→            icon="icon-contact"
   217→            title="Demais localidades"
   218→            description="0800 015 0252"
   219→            iconRight="icon-next"
   220→            showIcon
   221→            showTagLabel={false}
   222→            onPress={() => {
   223→              eventSelectContent({
   224→                content_type: 'cta',
   225→                content_id: 'telefones_demais_localidades',
   226→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   227→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   228→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   229→              });
   230→
   231→              Linking.openURL('tel:08000150252');
   232→            }}
   233→          />
   234→          <Text type="paragraphXS" color="INTENSE_COLOR_04" mt="xxxxs">
   235→            *Atendimento de segunda à sexta das 9h às 21h. Sábado e domingo das
   236→            9h às 17h.
   237→          </Text>
   238→        </Box>
   239→
   240→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxxxs">
   241→          <Text
   242→            type="linkMDM"
   243→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
   244→            onPress={handleCloseReportProblem}
   245→            align="center"
   246→          >
   247→            Fechar
   248→          </Text>
   249→        </Box>
   250→      </BackDropBottom>
   251→    </>
   252→  );
   253→};
   254→
   255→export default PointsDetailView;
   256→

<system-reminder>

content.text: Let me examine the invoice/rescue flows and model structures:

content.content:
1→import {
     2→  Alert,
     3→  BackDropBottom,
     4→  Box,
     5→  Button,
     6→  Icon,
     7→  ListTextIcon,
     8→  Loading,
     9→  SeparatorHorizontal,
    10→  Text,
    11→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    12→import { FC } from 'react';
    13→
    14→import React from 'react';
    15→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
    16→import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
    17→
    18→const InvoiceCashbackSummaryView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
    19→  handleGoBack,
    20→  onConfirmRescue,
    21→  onExitResult,
    22→  isRescueLoading,
    23→  isRescueConcluded,
    24→  isRescueFailed,
    25→  items,
    26→  effectiveShowResult,
    27→  onOpenDefault,
    28→  modalizeRef1,
    29→  formattedSelectedPoints,
    30→  formattedSelectedReais,
    31→  screenTitle,
    32→  height,
    33→}) => {
    34→  return (
    35→    <BasicScreen
    36→      hasScroll
    37→      hasHeader
    38→      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
    39→      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    40→      title={screenTitle ?? ''}
    41→      hasRightIcon={!effectiveShowResult}
    42→      rightIcon="icon-help"
    43→      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
    44→      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
    45→      isLoading={false}
    46→    >
    47→      {!effectiveShowResult ? (
    48→        <>
    49→          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
    50→            <Text
    51→              color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
    52→              testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
    53→              type="headingMDL"
    54→              mt="smaller"
    55→              mb="small"
    56→            >
    57→              Revise as informações para confirmar o cashback
    58→            </Text>
    59→
    60→            <Text
    61→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    62→              type="paragraphMDM"
    63→              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    64→              mb="nano"
    65→            >
    66→              Valor em pontos
    67→            </Text>
    68→
    69→            <Text
    70→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    71→              type="paragraphL"
    72→              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    73→              mt="nano"
    74→              mb="xxs"
    75→            >
    76→              {formattedSelectedPoints}
    77→            </Text>
    78→
    79→            <SeparatorHorizontal
    80→              mb="xxs"
    81→              bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
    82→              height={1}
    83→              width="100%"
    84→            />
    85→
    86→            <Text
    87→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    88→              type="paragraphMDM"
    89→              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    90→              mb="nano"
    91→            >
    92→              Valor em reais
    93→            </Text>
    94→
    95→            <Text
    96→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    97→              type="paragraphL"
    98→              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    99→              mt="nano"
   100→              mb="xxs"
   101→            >
   102→              {formattedSelectedReais}
   103→            </Text>
   104→
   105→            <SeparatorHorizontal
   106→              mb="xxs"
   107→              bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   108→              height={1}
   109→              width="100%"
   110→            />
   111→
   112→            <Text
   113→              align="left"
   114→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   115→              type="paragraphMDM"
   116→              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   117→              mb="nano"
   118→            >
   119→              Cashback em
   120→            </Text>
   121→
   122→            <Text
   123→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   124→              type="paragraphL"
   125→              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   126→              mt="nano"
   127→              mb="xxs"
   128→            >
   129→              Até 72h
   130→            </Text>
   131→
   132→            <Alert
   133→              label="O valor é aplicado e exibido nos lançamentos da sua fatura aberta."
   134→              type="highlight"
   135→              icon="icon-calendar"
   136→            />
   137→          </Box>
   138→
   139→          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
   140→            <Button
   141→              text="Confirmar desconto"
   142→              mt="large"
   143→              mb="small"
   144→              onPress={onConfirmRescue}
   145→              disabled={!!isRescueLoading}
   146→              testID="invoice-cashback-button"
   147→            />
   148→
   149→            <Loading title="Aguarde..." visible={!!isRescueLoading} />
   150→          </Box>
   151→        </>
   152→      ) : (
   153→        <>
   154→          {isRescueConcluded && !isRescueFailed && (
   155→            <>
   156→              <Box
   157→                ml="smaller"
   158→                mr="smaller"
   159→                flex={1}
   160→                justify="center"
   161→                align="center"
   162→              >
   163→                <Box
   164→                  bgColor="PLUS_COLOR_03"
   165→                  borderColor="PLUS_COLOR_01"
   166→                  borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
   167→                  pd="innerMedium"
   168→                  borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
   169→                  borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
   170→                  borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
   171→                  borderBottomWidth="small"
   172→                  borderTopWidth="small"
   173→                  borderLeftWidth="small"
   174→                  borderRightWidth="small"
   175→                  mb="small"
   176→                >
   177→                  <Icon name="icon-check" color="PLUS_COLOR_01" size="sm" />
   178→                </Box>
   179→
   180→                <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="small">
   181→                  Cashback aplicado
   182→                </Text>
   183→
   184→                <Text
   185→                  align="center"
   186→                  type="paragraphLG"
   187→                  color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
   188→                  mb="small"
   189→                >
   190→                  O valor será aplicado em até 72h na sua fatura aberta.
   191→                </Text>
   192→              </Box>
   193→
   194→              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
   195→                <Button
   196→                  text="Ir para o início"
   197→                  mt="large"
   198→                  mb="small"
   199→                  onPress={onExitResult}
   200→                  testID="invoice-cashback-result-success-button"
   201→                />
   202→              </Box>
   203→            </>
   204→          )}
   205→          {!isRescueConcluded && isRescueFailed && (
   206→            <>
   207→              <Box
   208→                ml="smaller"
   209→                mr="smaller"
   210→                flex={1}
   211→                justify="center"
   212→                align="center"
   213→              >
   214→                <Box
   215→                  bgColor="DENY_COLOR_03"
   216→                  borderColor="DENY_COLOR_01"
   217→                  borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
   218→                  pd="innerMedium"
   219→                  borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
   220→                  borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
   221→                  borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
   222→                  borderBottomWidth="small"
   223→                  borderTopWidth="small"
   224→                  borderLeftWidth="small"
   225→                  borderRightWidth="small"
   226→                  mb="small"
   227→                >
   228→                  <Icon
   229→                    name="icon-circle-alert"
   230→                    color="DENY_COLOR_01"
   231→                    size="sm"
   232→                  />
   233→                </Box>
   234→
   235→                <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="small">
   236→                  Algo deu errado!
   237→                </Text>
   238→
   239→                <Text type="paragraphLG" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="small">
   240→                  Por favor, tente mais tarde.
   241→                </Text>
   242→              </Box>
   243→
   244→              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
   245→                <Button
   246→                  text="Voltar"
   247→                  mt="large"
   248→                  mb="small"
   249→                  onPress={onExitResult}
   250→                  testID="invoice-cashback-result-failed-button"
   251→                />
   252→              </Box>
   253→            </>
   254→          )}
   255→        </>
   256→      )}
   257→
   258→      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
   259→        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
   260→          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
   261→        </Text>
   262→
   263→        <ListTextIcon
   264→          items={items}
   265→          ml="nano"
   266→          mr="nano"
   267→          type="list"
   268→          mb="smaller"
   269→        />
   270→
   271→        <Button
   272→          text="Entendi"
   273→          onPress={() => {
   274→            modalizeRef1.current?.close?.();
   275→          }}
   276→        />
   277→      </BackDropBottom>
   278→    </BasicScreen>
   279→  );
   280→};
   281→
   282→export default InvoiceCashbackSummaryView;
   283→

1→import {
     2→  BackDropBottom,
     3→  Box,
     4→  Button,
     5→  Icon,
     6→  InputBox,
     7→  ListTextIcon,
     8→  Text,
     9→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    10→import React, { FC } from 'react';
    11→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
    12→import { Skeleton } from '../../components/TransactionsListFactory/styles';
    13→import { formatCurrencyBR, getFormattedPoints } from '../../utils/functions';
    14→import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
    15→
    16→const InvoiceCashbackPointsView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
    17→  handleGoBack,
    18→  handleContinue,
    19→  points,
    20→  formattedPrice,
    21→  handleChangeReais,
    22→  handleChangePoints,
    23→  handleUseAll,
    24→  pointsValue,
    25→  reaisValue,
    26→  convertionValue,
    27→  pointsError,
    28→  reaisError,
    29→  items,
    30→  pointsQuantity,
    31→  handleModalizeContinue,
    32→  onOpenDefault,
    33→  modalizeRef1,
    34→  handleSelectEvent,
    35→  height,
    36→  width,
    37→  isLoadingParameterization,
    38→}) => {
    39→  return (
    40→    <BasicScreen
    41→      hasScroll
    42→      hasHeader
    43→      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
    44→      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    45→      title="Cashback na fatura"
    46→      hasRightIcon
    47→      rightIcon="icon-help"
    48→      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
    49→      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
    50→      isLoading={false}
    51→    >
    52→      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
    53→        <Text
    54→          color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
    55→          testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
    56→          type="headingMDL"
    57→          mt="smaller"
    58→        >
    59→          Defina quanto cashback quer na sua fatura
    60→        </Text>
    61→
    62→        <Box direction mb="smaller" mt="nano" align="center">
    63→          <Text type="paragraphMD" mr="quark">
    64→            Pontos disponíveis:
    65→          </Text>
    66→          <Text type="paragraphXXXL" mr="quark">
    67→            {getFormattedPoints(points || 0)}
    68→          </Text>
    69→          <Text type="paragraphMD">({formattedPrice})</Text>
    70→        </Box>
    71→
    72→        <InputBox
    73→          label="Valor em pontos"
    74→          placeholder="0"
    75→          showLabel
    76→          keyboardType="number-pad"
    77→          value={pointsValue}
    78→          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_pontos')}
    79→          onChangeText={handleChangePoints}
    80→          error={pointsError}
    81→          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
    82→          textRight="Usar todos"
    83→          onPressTextRight={handleUseAll}
    84→        />
    85→
    86→        <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
    87→          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
    88→          <Icon
    89→            name="icon-switch-vertical"
    90→            size="xxs"
    91→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
    92→            mr="nano"
    93→            ml="nano"
    94→          />
    95→          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
    96→        </Box>
    97→
    98→        <InputBox
    99→          label="Valor em reais"
   100→          placeholder="R$0,00"
   101→          showLabel
   102→          keyboardType="decimal-pad"
   103→          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_valor')}
   104→          value={reaisValue}
   105→          onChangeText={handleChangeReais}
   106→          error={reaisError}
   107→          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
   108→        />
   109→        {isLoadingParameterization && (
   110→          <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
   111→            <Skeleton width={width - 40} height={60} />
   112→          </Box>
   113→        )}
   114→        {!isLoadingParameterization && (
   115→          <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
   116→            <Text type="paragraphMD">
   117→              Cada {pointsQuantity || '0'} pontos valem{' '}
   118→              {convertionValue || formatCurrencyBR(0)} de cashback na fatura.
   119→            </Text>
   120→          </Box>
   121→        )}
   122→      </Box>
   123→      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
   124→        <Button
   125→          disabled={
   126→            pointsValue === '' ||
   127→            reaisValue === '' ||
   128→            pointsValue === '0' ||
   129→            reaisValue === '0' ||
   130→            pointsError ||
   131→            reaisError
   132→          }
   133→          text="Continuar"
   134→          mt="large"
   135→          mb="small"
   136→          onPress={handleContinue}
   137→          testID="invoice-cashback-button"
   138→        />
   139→      </Box>
   140→      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
   141→        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
   142→          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
   143→        </Text>
   144→
   145→        <ListTextIcon
   146→          items={items}
   147→          ml="nano"
   148→          mr="nano"
   149→          type="list"
   150→          mb="smaller"
   151→        />
   152→
   153→        <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleModalizeContinue} />
   154→      </BackDropBottom>
   155→    </BasicScreen>
   156→  );
   157→};
   158→
   159→export default InvoiceCashbackPointsView;
   160→

1→import { Box, Button, ListTextIcon, Text } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
     2→import React, { FC } from 'react';
     3→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
     4→import { Skeleton } from '../../components/TransactionsListFactory/styles';
     5→import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
     6→
     7→const InvoiceCashbackView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
     8→  items,
     9→  hasError,
    10→  hasLoading,
    11→  handleGoBack,
    12→  handleContinue,
    13→  handleRetry,
    14→  cashbackInvoiceList,
    15→  isLoadingParameterization,
    16→  width,
    17→}) => {
    18→  return (
    19→    <BasicScreen
    20→      hasScroll
    21→      hasHeader
    22→      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
    23→      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    24→      title="Cashback na fatura"
    25→      hasRightIcon={false}
    26→      errorButtonOnPress={handleRetry}
    27→      isLoading={hasLoading}
    28→      hasError={hasError}
    29→    >
    30→      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
    31→        <Text
    32→          color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
    33→          testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
    34→          type="headingMDL"
    35→          mt="smaller"
    36→        >
    37→          Use pontos para pagar menos na fatura
    38→        </Text>
    39→      </Box>
    40→      {isLoadingParameterization &&
    41→        cashbackInvoiceList?.map?.((_, index) => (
    42→          <Box pd="innerLarge" key={`skeleton-${index}`}>
    43→            <Skeleton width={width - 40} height={60} />
    44→          </Box>
    45→        ))}
    46→      {!isLoadingParameterization && (
    47→        <>
    48→          <Box ml="nano" mr="nano" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
    49→            <ListTextIcon
    50→              items={items}
    51→              ml="nano"
    52→              mr="xs"
    53→              mt="xxs"
    54→              type="list"
    55→            />
    56→          </Box>
    57→
    58→          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
    59→            <Button
    60→              text="Continuar"
    61→              mt="large"
    62→              mb="small"
    63→              onPress={handleContinue}
    64→              testID="invoice-cashback-button"
    65→            />
    66→          </Box>
    67→        </>
    68→      )}
    69→    </BasicScreen>
    70→  );
    71→};
    72→
    73→export default InvoiceCashbackView;
    74→
